Records
Quick Tour

New to PoTa Tracker? The guided tour walks you through all 8 key sections — Dashboard, Growers, Plantation, Pests & Diseases, Yield Assessment, Variety Performance, Comparative Analysis, and Season Report — in under 60 seconds.

My Account

As a Field Officer you can update your login password and export a data backup below. Contact an Administrator to change your role, zone access, or username.

Potato Varieties
Outbreak Alert Sensitivity

Tune when the Early Pest Outbreak Alert fires — triggered when 2+ growers in the same zone record the same pest/disease above the thresholds below within the time window.

Low+Moderate+High only
0%50%100%
3d30d60d
A record matches if it meets either the severity or the affected-area threshold. An alert fires once when 2+ distinct growers in the same zone match the same pest/disease within the window.
Google Sheets Integration
Paste your Web App URL. Execute as: Me | Who has access: Anyone.
Set the same secret in your GAS script via PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().setProperty('HMAC_SECRET','…'). GAS will reject unsigned/mismatched calls.
User Management
Data Management
Import Past Season Data

Three ways to load 2024 / 2025 historical records into PoTa Tracker:

Option 1 — JSON Backup
Click Import Backup (above) and select a previous pota-backup-*.json file to restore all records instantly.
Option 2 — Pull from Google Sheets
Enter past rows directly into your Google Sheet (same column headers as the GAS schema), then click Pull All Data in the Sheets Integration card.
Option 3 — Manual Entry with Past Dates
Use the Plantation / Yield / Pest forms and simply set the date field to a past date (e.g. 2024-03-15). The Comparative Analysis charts automatically group data by year and season.
Option 4 — importBatch API (Advanced)
The v4 GAS script accepts bulk imports: POST to your GAS URL with
{ "action":"importBatch", "type":"plantation", "records":[{...}] }
Valid types: plantation, grower, yieldAssessment, pestDisease.
All data auto-saved to localStorage. Use Export/Import for backup.
Viewer Share Link

Generate a read-only link for managers or external reviewers. Anyone with this link can view Dashboard, Trends, Production Forecast, and Comparative Analysis only — no editing.

Share this URL on any device. Viewers see Dashboard, Trends, Production & Comparative only. Click Revoke to invalidate all existing links immediately.
